executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are green; whole-stack certification blocked by stale external marketing independent verification artifact (May 28) and escalated blocked-channel-recovery timeout (1139 repeats).
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Refresh marketing independent verification to clear the stale artifact; resolve blocked-channel-recovery timeout escalation.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Live Gateway cron topology is fully green
findings.mechanism: Direct live inspection: 24 jobs, 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 last-error. No topology drift.
findings.root_cause: Architecture topology is coherent; no disabled jobs, no stale runners, no error state on any job.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Independent verification passed (qualified_pass). Loop integrity OK. Architecture verifier source present with freshness-gate logic (hash f1543d734).

findings.title: Docs verifier is independently green
findings.mechanism: ralph_verifier_latest.md reports independently verified pass at 2026-06-01T20:20 UTC. CHECKER=OK, EDITORIAL=OK, AGENTIC=pass.

findings.title: Shared market-intelligence consumption remains machine-verifiable
findings.mechanism: market_intelligence_consumption_latest.json shows 3 code-backed consumers (run.py, reddit_monitor.py, distribution_lane_executor.py) all loaded.
findings.root_cause: Market intelligence reuse is structurally sound.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification is stale — blocks whole-stack certification
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_independent_verification.json dates to 2026-05-28 (~4 days old). Verdict=fail. Max age threshold: 240 minutes.
findings.root_cause: Marketing owner loop has not produced fresh measurable outcome evidence.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and rerun independent verification.

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery timeout escalation at 1139 repeats
findings.mechanism: Health monitor reports blocked-channel-recovery_escalation at level=critical with 1139 repeats in recent history. Root timeout on the job itself.
findings.root_cause: blocked-channel-recovery cron job times out consistently (600s limit, last measured 326766ms).
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate and repair the blocked-channel-recovery cron job timeout cause (likely hung script or infinite loop).

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed to current live state: 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 last-error. Topology is fully green — no disabled jobs or error runners.
Confirmed independent verification artifact at 22:20 UTC remains qualified_pass with all 10 verified claims intact.
Confirmed 3 code-backed consumers (run.py, reddit_monitor.py, distribution_lane_executor.py) all loaded with current data.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
Resolution of blocked-channel-recovery timeout escalation (1139 repeats).

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing independent verification artifact is stale (~4 days old)
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned gates are green but whole-stack certification blocked by stale external evidence.

notes: Architecture green means architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.

Remaining blockers are external: marketing independent verification stale + blocked-channel-recovery timeout escalation.
